howItWorks.intro: This seam allowance calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Cut Size
rules.explanation: Add seam allowance to both sides of each edge.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: 5/8 inch (1.5cm) for garments, 1/4 inch for quilting.

faq.q: When to use wider seam allowance?
faq.a: Use 1 inch for loosely woven fabrics or areas that need adjustment room.
